binary.notes: Use sub_scores={} only if the family exposes no finer-grained assertions.

checklist.notes: Preserve stable assertion ids rather than emitting only a scalar reward.

continuous.notes: Use the family metric name when one already exists.

diff_similarity.notes: Keep the weighted composite in reward and component recalls in sub_scores.

f1.notes: Include precision/recall even when reward duplicates f1.

f1_hybrid.notes: Artifact bridge tasks should still identify answer_json_bridge in output_contract.mode.
f1_hybrid.reward_source: Blended detection F1 and fix quality score.

find_and_prove.notes: Use stable assertion ids for fail-on-buggy, pass-after-patch, and explanation checks.

ir_checklist.notes: Preserve retrieval-specific assertion ids in sub_scores.

oracle_checks.notes: One sub-score entry per configured oracle check; keep raw checker payload in details.

repo_state_heuristic.notes: Use stable assertion ids instead of only shell log output.

score.notes: Transitional family only; preferred family names should be more specific.

semantic_retrieval_qa.notes: Keep free-form reasoning under details rather than flattening it into top-level fields.

semantic_similarity.notes: Record the exact similarity measure in details when multiple measures exist.

test_ratio.notes: Store passed/failed counts in details when available.

migration_classes.already_validation_result: Task already writes validation_result.json and should backfill any missing canonical fields.
migration_classes.emit_validation_result_sidecar: Task writes reward.txt only and should add validation_result.json alongside it.
migration_classes.wrap_reward_json: Task writes reward.json today and should wrap that scalar into validation_result.json.

status_values.invalid_output: Required task output was missing or malformed, so the run was not scorable.
status_values.scored: Verifier had enough task output to compute a reward.
status_values.verifier_error: Verifier dependencies or runtime failed before scoring could complete.
